architectureDecision.label: Fail closed unless overwriteExisting:true
architectureDecision.rationale: Mirror task-state-migrate-baseline: refuse to seed when planning tail exists unless operator passes overwriteExisting; dry-run reports conflict.

readyReview.decision: Baseline fails if remote has planning events unless overwriteExisting:true; seed from fullest laptop first.

technicalBreakdown: Implement runPlanningStateMigrateBaseline reading kit_phase_catalog + kit_workspace_status rows.
Detect existing planning tail on workflow-cannon/task-state; fail closed unless overwriteExisting:true.
Wire publish via existing task-state git layout (same stream as tasks).
Register command + instruction capsule; document seed ritual in .ai/runbooks/task-state-git-operator.md.

acceptanceCriteria: Dry-run reports row counts, content digest, and conflict when remote planning tail exists.
Apply publishes genesis planning events only when branch lacks planning tail or overwriteExisting is true.
Operator runbook documents one-time seed ritual on the machine with the most complete catalog.
Command registered with --schema-only capsule and appears in run --list-commands.
